title: SEED: Self-Evolving On-Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
innovation_summary: SEED: Self-Evolving On-Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning: We propose SEED (SElf-Evolving On-Policy Distillation), a self-evolving framework that converts completed on-policy trajectories into training-time hindsight skills and distills their behavioral effect back into the.
